title: EPA Announces E15 Implementation Deadline Extensions for South Dakota, Ohio
content: The U.S. Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) announced its intent to act on requests from South Dakota and Ohio seeking a one-year extension of the current implementation date to remove the 1-psi volatility waiver for E10. This action follows the February 26, 2025 deadline for states to submit written requests for delay. Kansas, which was not among the eight states addressed in the final rule, submitted a similar request.
author: Analysts Account
